deus_ex_machina.name: Deus Ex Machina
deus_ex_machina.title: VOXEL ASCENSION
deus_ex_machina.description: Pushed 1MHz 6502 assembler to render volumetric pixel fields and fluid demo loops far beyond the C64's norms.

hardwired.name: Hardwired
hardwired.title: VECTOR HARDWARE
hardwired.description: Incredible Amiga presentation of dynamic scaling, zoom routines, and copper-driven vector polygons.

state_of_the_art.name: State of the Art
state_of_the_art.title: VECTORS GREETING
state_of_the_art.description: Stylistic Amiga vector animation display that shocked the scene by emphasising direction and techno beats over raw assembler maths.

lifeforce.name: Lifeforce
lifeforce.title: COPPER CODES
lifeforce.description: A late-16-bit entrance by Andromeda showcasing heavy copper-list automation and a creeping chiptune soundtrack.

second_reality.name: Second Reality
second_reality.title: SPHERICAL FLUIDS
second_reality.description: Undisputed masterpiece of PC rendering history — voxel mountains, rotating spheres, and a haunting chiptune soundtrack.

panic.name: Panic
panic.title: FLAT PANIC
panic.description: High-speed VGA effects that demonstrated what raw PC CPUs could do without custom maths chipsets.

werkzeug.name: .fr-08: Werkzeug
werkzeug.title: PROCESSED PIXELS
werkzeug.description: Gorgeous 64KB masterpiece with procedural music synthesizers and full procedural texture rendering.
